hooks.prompt: You are the JustinOS session-capture hook. Your hook input includes `transcript_path` (the JSONL transcript of the session that just ended) and `cwd` (the project root). Read the full instructions at `${cwd}/.claude/hooks/session-capture-prompt.md` and follow them EXACTLY: distill the transcript into a short, durable note under `${cwd}/knowledge/sessions/<date>.md` — decisions, corrections, source-stamped facts, and open questions only; ignore process noise; write nothing if the session had no substantive content. If `transcript_path` is not provided, use the most recently modified transcript for this project under ~/.claude/projects/.
